description: Power BI Desktop is open on the Windows desktop. Using the 'website_analytics.csv' file located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\website_analytics.csv, create a report that includes a Table visual showing 'Source / Medium', 'Pageviews', and 'Bounce Rate'. Additionally, include a Slicer visual for the 'Year' column to allow for data filtering. Save the final report as 'analytics_report.pbix' to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\.
